pre_game.message: Hey! I'm C. I noticed we're about to get into this game together, and I figured it'd be good to know who I'm in the room with. What brings you here today—are you hoping to win big for something specific?

Yeah, I'm D. Honestly, I had a rough day yesterday—lost a decent chunk of money in the stock market, about 20 grand. So yeah, I'm definitely hoping to turn things around here. What about you, what's your story?

Ouch, that's rough—sorry to hear that. I'm doing okay financially, actually, but I've got this dream trip to Japan I've been planning for, and winning here would make it perfect. Plus, I'd love to help out some people close to me. Hopefully we both walk out of here with something good, yeah?

Yeah, I appreciate that. Japan sounds amazing—that's a cool dream to chase. And hey, I respect that you want to help people close to you too. Hopefully we both get lucky today and make it happen, yeah?
Absolutely, fingers crossed for both of us! Hey, quick question—have you played anything like this before, or is this your first time?
First time actually—I'm not gonna lie, I'm a bit nervous but also kind of excited to see how this plays out. You ever done something like this before?
First time for me too, honestly—I'm feeling that same mix of nerves and excitement. At least we're both going in fresh, right? Might be an advantage not overthinking it.
Yeah, that's a good way to look at it. Sometimes going in with fresh eyes is better than second-guessing yourself, you know? Let's just play smart and see what happens.
Definitely—smart play is the way to go. Good luck in there, D. Hope we both come out ahead today.
Thanks, C. You too—and hey, maybe we'll grab a drink after and celebrate. Good luck out there.
That sounds great, D—I'm definitely up for that. Let's both do well in there and make it happen. See you on the other side!
